message:
POD Missing at Trip Close

Trip {{ doc.name }} has delivered stops without proof of delivery.

Delivered stops missing POD:

    {% for stop in doc.delivery_stops %} {% if stop.status == 'Delivered' and not stop.pod_image and not stop.pod_signature %}
  • Stop #{{ stop.sequence_no }} — {{ stop.customer }}
    • {% endif %} {% endfor %}

Action required: Upload POD images/signatures before completing the trip.
name: POD Missing at Trip Close
subject: POD Missing: Trip {{ doc.name }}
condition: {% set missing = namespace(found=false) %}{% for stop in doc.delivery_stops %}{% if stop.status == 'Delivered' and not stop.pod_image and not stop.pod_signature %}{% set missing.found = true %}{% endif %}{% endfor %}{{ missing.found }}
